data.title: SSR Mining reveals Hod Maden Technical Report with $1.66B NPV5% and 39% IRR, confirming project's potential.
data.description: SSR Mining Inc. has finished a Technical Report Summary for the Hod Maden project situated in northeastern Türkiye. This report, known as the 2025 Hod Maden TRS, confirms that the Project is expected to be one of the most profitable undeveloped copper-gold projects. All figures mentioned are on a 100% basis and in U.S. dollars. This updated technical report emphasizes the promising future of Hod Maden, highlighting its potential as a high-return investment venture.

data.title: NABIP urges CMS to protect access and fair compensation in CY 2027 Medicare rule.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, the National Association of Benefits and Insurance Professionals (NABIP) sent a comment letter to the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) regarding the proposed changes for Medicare Advantage and Part D for Contract Year 2027. The letter outlines concerns and suggestions for the upcoming year.

data.title: Investor alert: Levi & Korsinsky investigating Alector, Inc. after Phase 3 trial miss co-primary endpoint.
data.description: A legal firm, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP, is currently conducting an investigation into Alector, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALEC) as per their recent declaration of the topline findings from the Phase 3 INFRONT-3 trial. This trial focused on assessing latozinemab for individuals diagnosed with frontotemporal dementia caused by a gene mutation.

data.title: HDFC Bank's deposit growth lags behind loan growth post merger with HDFC Limited. Stock under review.(Character count: 94)
data.description: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP is currently investigating HDFC Bank Limited (NYSE: HDB) due to the increasing disparity between the bank's deposit growth and loan growth trends subsequent to merging with HDFC Limited. The investigation, announced on Jan. 29, 2026, is scrutinizing the impact of this merger on the bank's performance. Investors who bought shares of HDFC Bank Limited are advised to stay updated on the developments related to this investigation.

data.title: Investigation by Levi & Korsinsky into Regenxbio regarding disclosure completeness in gene therapy programs. (NASDAQ: RGNX)
data.description: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP is currently conducting an investigation into Regenxbio Inc. (NASDAQ: RGNX) due to concerns about potential discrepancies in information shared with investors and safety updates related to the company's gene therapy clinical initiatives. Shareholders are urged to stay informed as more details unfold about the situation.

data.title: AI improves efficiency but erodes loyalty as per 2026 Customer Expectations Report from Gladly. Customers expect AI support.
data.description: The recently released 2026 Customer Expectations Report highlights a significant disparity between efficiency and trust among consumers. The report indicates a noticeable shift in customer expectations, with an increasing reliance on AI for support services. The data suggests that customers now prefer to engage with AI as their initial point of contact, showing a strong inclination towards its effectiveness. However, the report also underscores a concerning trend, revealing a widening gap between efficiency and trust in customer interactions. This growing disparity signifies a pressing need for businesses to prioritize building and maintaining trust with their clientele.

data.title: AANA criticizes ED's proposed rule on student loan caps for CRNAs and other advanced nursing degrees. Jan. 29, 2026.
data.description: In Rosemont, Illinois, on January 29, 2026, the American Association of Nurse Anesthetists (AANA) expressed strong disappointment at the U.S. Department of Education's decision to proceed with a plan that would restrict the amount of federal student loans that graduate students, including Certified Registered Nurse Anesthetists (CRNAs), can access. The proposal will have a direct impact on CRNAs and other advanced professionals in the field.

data.title: $220M security fund created from unclaimed Ethereum from a decade-old hack to support audits, tooling, incident responses.
data.description: Ethereum that has remained unclaimed for ten years following a hacking incident will now be used for staking and distributed to support audits, tool development, and incident responses. The exact amount of Ethereum to be utilized for this purpose has not been specified.
Creator of WallStreetBets voices concerns as Reddit tightens rules on Miami event.

data.title: MediciNova enrolled 100 ALS patients in SEANOBI EAP; aims for 200 total. MN‑166 being evaluated.
data.description: MediciNova, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company listed on the NASDAQ Global Market (NASDAQ:MNOV) and the Standard Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange (Code Number: 4875), revealed on Jan. 29, 2026, that 12 locations across the US are now active and 100 participants have been recruited for the SEANOBI study (NCT 06743776). This study, known as Scalable Expanded Access with Analysis of Neurofilament and Other Biomarkers in ALS, aims to enroll 200 patients to evaluate the effectiveness of MN‑166 (ibudilast) in individuals with amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS). The current enrollment progress represents exactly half of the targeted number of participants.

data.title: Newbridge Acquisition Limited prices $50M IPO with 5M units at $10 each, to be listed on NASDAQ under "NBRGU".
data.description: Hong Kong, China on Jan. 29, 2026 - Newbridge Acquisition Limited (NASDAQ: NBRG) disclosed the pricing of its initial public offering, comprising 5,000,000 units valued at $10.00 per unit. These units will soon be traded on the NASDAQ Capital Market under the ticker symbol "NBRGU" from Jan. 30, 2026. Each unit includes one Class A ordinary share and one right, with each right entitling the holder to obtain one-eighth (1/8) of a Class A ordinary share post the completion of an initial business combination. It is important to note that fractional rights will not be granted upon unit separation, thus necessitating eight rights to acquire one Class A ordinary share during the initial business combination closure. After the individual trading of the securities forming these units commences, the Class A ordinary shares and rights are anticipated to be listed on NASDAQ under "NBRG" and "NBRGR" symbols, respectively.
WHITE HOUSE: TRUMP SIGNED AN EXECUTIVE ORDER DECLARING A NATIONAL EMERGENCY AND ESTABLISHING A PROCESS TO IMPOSE TARIFFS ON GOODS FROM COUNTRIES THAT SELL OR OTHERWISE PROVIDE OIL TO CUBA

data.title: Bitfinex records 2-year high in Bitcoin longs; Possible $100K rally ahead amidst market uncertainty.
data.description: The number of Bitcoin margin long positions on Bitfinex exchange has surged to its highest level in two years, just before a significant drop in both stock and cryptocurrency prices. Traders are now uncertain whether to anticipate a market rally or if the ongoing correction will persist.

data.title: Richtech Robotics closes $38.7M private placement for 8.5M shares of Class B stock under Nasdaq rules.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, Richtech Robotics Inc. (Nasdaq: RR), a company from Nevada specializing in AI-driven service robots, revealed the completion of a private placement deal. This transaction involved the acquisition and trading of 8,500,000 shares of the Company’s Class B common stock at a price determined by Nasdaq rules.

data.title: Altimmune closed a $75 million direct offering with a new investor for 17,045,454 shares of common stock or pre-funded warrants, to develop pemvidutide for liver diseases.
data.description: Gaithersburg, Maryland, January 29, 2026 - Altimmune, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALT), a biopharmaceutical company at a late clinical stage, has concluded its previously announced registered direct offering with a new institutional investor, selling 17,045,454 shares of common stock (or pre-funded warrants in lieu of stock) for gross proceeds of around $75 million. Altimmune offered all the shares and pre-funded warrants in this public offering. The pre-funded warrants, exercisable at $0.001 per share upon issuance, have no expiration until fully exercised. This development aims to aid in the development of pemvidutide for treating severe liver conditions.

data.title: CVR Energy prices private placement of $600M 7.500% Senior Notes Due 2031 and $400M 7.875% Senior Notes Due 2034.
data.description: CVR Energy, Inc. disclosed that it priced a private placement offering under Rule 144A and Regulation S of the Securities Act of 1933. The offering includes $600 million in total of 7.500% senior unsecured notes maturing in 2031 (referred to as "2031 Notes") and $400 million in total of 7.875% senior unsecured notes maturing in 2034 (referred to as "2034 Notes"). This news comes from Sugar Land, Texas, and involves the company listed as CVR Energy on the NYSE under the ticker symbol CVI.

data.title: Primavera Online School receives a B grade from Arizona State Board of Education for 2024-25 after improved academic performance.
data.description: In Phoenix, Primavera Online School has received a B letter grade (considered highly performing) for the 2024-2025 school year, as announced today. The Arizona State Board of Education (SBE) finalized this grade during their public meeting on January 26, 2026, after a thorough assessment of academic performance data. This evaluation took into account updated accountability calculations and a comprehensive analysis of student performance outcomes.
